name: User Research
description: Planning and conducting user research to inform design decisions

levelDefinitions.title: Beginner
levelDefinitions.description: Can assist with basic interview note-taking and survey distribution

levelDefinitions.title: Practitioner
levelDefinitions.description: Can plan and conduct structured interviews and usability tests with guidance

levelDefinitions.title: Intermediate
levelDefinitions.description: Independently designs research plans, selects methods, and synthesizes findings

levelDefinitions.title: Advanced
levelDefinitions.description: Leads complex mixed-method studies and mentors others in research practices

levelDefinitions.title: Expert
levelDefinitions.description: Defines org-wide research strategy and introduces novel methodologies

name: UI Design
description: Visual and interaction design for digital products

levelDefinitions.title: Beginner
levelDefinitions.description: Can create simple layouts following an existing design system

levelDefinitions.title: Practitioner
levelDefinitions.description: Produces polished screens and components with some supervision

levelDefinitions.title: Intermediate
levelDefinitions.description: Designs end-to-end flows, maintains design systems, and ensures consistency

levelDefinitions.title: Advanced
levelDefinitions.description: Creates and evolves design systems, sets visual direction for products

levelDefinitions.title: Expert
levelDefinitions.description: Industry-recognized craft excellence; defines design language at scale

name: React
description: Building user interfaces with React and its ecosystem

levelDefinitions.title: Beginner
levelDefinitions.description: Understands JSX, props, and state; can build simple components

levelDefinitions.title: Practitioner
levelDefinitions.description: Works with hooks, context, and common libraries in a team codebase

levelDefinitions.title: Intermediate
levelDefinitions.description: Architects component hierarchies, manages complex state, and optimizes performance

levelDefinitions.title: Advanced
levelDefinitions.description: Designs reusable libraries, implements advanced patterns, and mentors the team

levelDefinitions.title: Expert
levelDefinitions.description: Deep framework internals knowledge; drives technical strategy across projects

name: Stakeholder Management
description: Engaging and aligning stakeholders throughout a project lifecycle

levelDefinitions.title: Beginner
levelDefinitions.description: Participates in stakeholder meetings and takes notes

levelDefinitions.title: Practitioner
levelDefinitions.description: Prepares presentations and facilitates small alignment sessions

levelDefinitions.title: Intermediate
levelDefinitions.description: Manages competing priorities across multiple stakeholder groups

levelDefinitions.title: Advanced
levelDefinitions.description: Navigates complex organizational politics and drives executive buy-in

levelDefinitions.title: Expert
levelDefinitions.description: Shapes client relationships at C-level and influences strategic direction

name: Prototyping
description: Creating interactive prototypes to validate concepts and communicate design intent

levelDefinitions.title: Beginner
levelDefinitions.description: Builds basic click-through prototypes in Figma or similar tools

levelDefinitions.title: Practitioner
levelDefinitions.description: Creates multi-screen prototypes with realistic interactions

levelDefinitions.title: Intermediate
levelDefinitions.description: Produces high-fidelity prototypes with animations and conditional logic

levelDefinitions.title: Advanced
levelDefinitions.description: Builds code-based prototypes and selects the right fidelity for each context

levelDefinitions.title: Expert
levelDefinitions.description: Pioneers new prototyping techniques and tools for the organization
